checkpoint.summary: unit_029 complete. Whole-file rewrite of skills/development-harness/commands/invoke.md from 432 to 332 lines, collapsing the old 'sequential path vs parallel path' fork into a single batch-driven 12-step pipeline (Steps 0-11). Steps 5 and 6 carry the only branching (in-tree fast path for batch-of-1-with-parallelism-off vs worktree fan-out via dispatch_batch + Agent(harness-unit) per unit in one message); every other step converges. fleet.mode transitions documented end-to-end (idle -> dispatched -> merging -> idle). Step 3 guards against non-idle start state; Step 7 does scope-violation + report-hygiene; Step 8 uses merge_batch.py for fan-out and is a no-op in-tree; Step 9 marks session_count += 1 per turn regardless of batch size. Parallel phase-review dispatch (unit_032 acceptance) in Step 10 and ISSUE_002 /loop workaround in Step 11 both pre-satisfied. Zero capability regressions from prior phases (Exploration, multi-file parallel edits, parallel Layer 1+Layer 2 validation all preserved inside the in-tree branch of Step 6). 171/171 tests unchanged.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_030 (PHASE_007): mirror the rewritten batch-driven flow into skills/development-harness/templates/workspace-commands/invoke-development-harness.md with wording consistent with the command-doc version (same 12-step numbering, same in-tree vs worktree fan-out branching in Steps 5/6, same fleet.mode transitions, same single-assistant-message Agent(harness-unit) dispatch).
